title: Remove GST/tax from invoice calculations and display

requirements.text: Remove all GST/tax fields, calculations, and references from the Create Invoice page. The form should no longer display a tax rate input, tax amount line, or any GST-related field. The invoice total should be calculated as subtotal only (sum of line items), with no tax applied.
acceptanceCriteria: The Create Invoice form has no tax rate or GST input field
No tax amount is calculated or displayed during invoice creation
The invoice total equals the subtotal (sum of all line item quantities × unit prices)
No GST label or percentage is shown anywhere on the Create Invoice page

requirements.text: Remove all GST/tax fields and references from the Invoice Detail page and the InvoicePrintHeader component. The printable invoice layout should not display any tax amount, GST number placeholder, or tax line. The total shown on the invoice should equal the subtotal with no tax deduction or addition.
acceptanceCriteria: The Invoice Detail page shows no tax or GST row in the line items summary
The printed invoice layout shows no GST placeholder, tax amount, or tax rate
The invoice total displayed equals the subtotal of all line items
InvoicePrintHeader no longer contains any GST-related text or placeholder

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko actor so that the invoice data model no longer requires or stores a tax amount field. The createInvoice function should accept invoices without a tax field, and the total should be stored as equal to the subtotal.
acceptanceCriteria: The Invoice record type in the Motoko actor has no tax or gst field
The createInvoice function does not accept or store a tax amount
Invoice totals stored in the backend equal the subtotal of line items
All existing backend functions (getInvoice, getAllInvoices, markAsPaid, markAsUnpaid) continue to work correctly

requirements.text: Update the Dashboard page to remove any display of tax-related stats or revenue calculations that previously included GST. Revenue totals shown on the dashboard should reflect subtotals (no tax component).
acceptanceCriteria: The Dashboard shows no GST or tax-related stat card or column
Total revenue displayed on the Dashboard is calculated from invoice subtotals/totals without any tax component

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Preserve all existing invoice fields except tax/GST-related ones
nonGoals: Adding any new tax system or alternative tax scheme
Changing the visual theme or color palette
Modifying the shop identity display (name, address)
Adding or removing any invoice fields other than tax/GST
